seoTitle: Fernvale vs Ferny Glen — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Fernvale and Ferny Glen. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Fernvale vs Ferny Glen: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fernvale and Ferny Glen.
heading: Fernvale vs Ferny Glen — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fernvale, Queensland and Ferny Glen, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Fernvale has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Ferny Glen (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fernvale or Ferny Glen safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fernvale has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Ferny Glen scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fernvale scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Ferny Glen scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fernvale or Ferny Glen?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Fernvale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
